paper_metadata.title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
paper_metadata.abstract: The BigCode community, an open-scientific collaboration working on the responsible development of Large Language Models for Code (Code LLMs), introduces StarCoder and StarCoderBase: 15.5B parameter models with 8K context length, infilling capabilities and fast large-batch inference enabled by multi-query attention. StarCoderBase is trained on 1 trillion tokens sourced from The Stack, a large collection of permissively licensed GitHub repositories with inspection tools and an opt-out process. We fine-tuned StarCoderBase on 35B Python tokens, resulting in the creation of StarCoder. We perform the most comprehensive evaluation of Code LLMs to date and show that StarCoderBase outperforms every open Code LLM that supports multiple programming languages and matches or outperforms the OpenAI code-cushman-001 model. Furthermore, StarCoder outperforms every model that is fine-tuned on Python, can be prompted to achieve 40\% pass@1 on HumanEval, and still retains its performance on other programming languages. We take several important steps towards a safe open-access model release, including an improved PII redaction pipeline and a novel attribution tracing tool, and make the StarCoder models publicly available under a more commercially viable version of the Open Responsible AI Model license.

extraction_data.innovation: StarCoder introduces Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) training, enabling the model to infill code given a prefix and suffix, improving code completion capabilities. It is trained on a large-scale, multi-language source code dataset with permissive licensing.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: The Stack (v1.2) dataset, a 6.4 TB corpus of permissively licensed source code in 86 programming languages
extraction_data.extension: Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) training enables infilling capabilities by restructuring input sequences to include prefix, middle, and suffix segments.
extraction_data.research_problem: Code generation and completion using large language models
extraction_data.application: Code completion, code generation, infilling, and program synthesis
extraction_data.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

extraction_data.innovation: A large-scale decoder-only model trained on a diverse corpus of source code, designed for code generation and understanding tasks. The paper focuses on PII detection and redaction as part of the model's training pipeline.
extraction_data.application: Code generation, code completion, PII redaction in codebases
extraction_data.research_problem: Code generation, understanding, and PII detection in source code
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (details not explicitly stated but implied for the main model)
extraction_data.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
